intended_use: Limbus Contour is a software-only medical device intended for use by trained radiation oncologists, dosimetrists and physicists to derive optimal contours for input to radiation treatment planning. Su
intended_use_full: Limbus Contour is a software-only medical device intended for use by trained radiation oncologists, dosimetrists and physicists to derive optimal contours for input to radiation treatment planning. Supported image modalities are Computed Tomography and Magnetic Resonance. The Limbus Contour Software assists in the following scenarios: Operates in conjunction with radiation treatment planning systems to load, save, and display medical images and contours for treatment evaluation and treatment planning. Creation, transformation, and modification of contours for applications including, but not limited to: transferring contours to radiotherapy treatment planning systems, aiding adaptive therapy and archiving contours for patient follow-up. Localization and definition of anatomical structures. Limbus Contour is not intended for use with digital mammography.
target_condition: Radiation therapy treatment planning for patients with cancer (CNS, head and neck, prostate, and other sites)
ground_truth: Human-generated expert contours reviewed and curated by in-house clinicians and radiation oncologist; contours consistent with consensus contouring guidelines (RTOG, RTOG 1106, RTOG 0848, EMBRACE II, DAHANCA, NRG, ESTRO, ACROP, EPTN)
other_metrics: Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) ≥ 0.90; 95% Hausdorff Distance (HD) ≤ 2.0 mm; mean editing score ≤ 2
